prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: character portrait. Story world: Static Between Stations. Premise: A dead rail line broadcasts private confessions in the players' own voices.. Setting: Abandoned commuter rail control annex. Threat presence: The Curator of Static. Recurring motifs: radio hiss, clock hands, platform chimes. Character portrait for Commuter Witness Nia Vale, role SUSPECT. Traits: guarded, analytical. Response style: accusation=Defensive and selective.; threat=Withdraws and delays.; questioning=Provides partial truths first... Subgenre: psychological horror. Tone: CINEMATIC. Immediate scene brief: Static Between Stations - Commuter Witness Nia Vale Portrait. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Create a realistic portrait with wardrobe, posture, facial tension, and environmental context that reveal personality and danger. Avoid floating-head composition. Frame as a prestige horror still, not concept art.
